entry.ptxt: DTC
DTC name
DTC detecting condition
Normal
SDM Wrong Assembly
SDM has inconsistent ID code.
Intermittent Connection of SDM Connector
Faulty connection of SDM connector.
SDM Internal Failure
Malfunctioned SDM internal circuit, G sensor, memory or CPU.
Power Source Voltage too High
Power supply voltage is more than specified range.
Power Source Voltage too Low
Power supply voltage is less than specified range.
Front Air Bag Deployment Record
Deployment of front air bag has been recorded in SDM.
Side Air Bag Deployment Record (Driver Side)
Deployment of driver-side side-air bag (inflator) module has been recorded in SDM.
Side Air Bag Deployment Record (Passenger Side)
Deployment of passenger-side side-air bag (inflator) module has been recorded in SDM.
Seat Belt Pretensioner Activation Record
Activation of seat belt pretensioner has been recorded in SDM.
Curtain Air Bag Deployment Record (Driver Side)
Deployment of driver-side curtain air bag (inflator) module has been recorded in SDM.
Curtain Air Bag Deployment Record (Passenger Side)
Deployment of passenger-side curtain air bag (inflator) module has been recorded in SDM.
Driver Air Bag Circuit High Resistance
Driver air bag (inflator) module circuit resistance is more than specified range.
Driver Air Bag Circuit Low Resistance
Driver air bag (inflator) module circuit resistance is less than specified range.
Driver Air Bag Circuit Shorted to Ground
Driver air bag (inflator) module circuit has been shorted to ground.
Driver Air Bag Circuit Shorted to Power Supply
Driver air bag (inflator) module circuit has been shorted to power supply.
Passenger Air Bag Circuit High Resistance
Passenger air bag (inflator) module circuit resistance is more than specified range.
Passenger Air Bag Circuit Low Resistance
Passenger air bag (inflator) module circuit resistance is less than specified range.
Passenger Air Bag Circuit Shorted to Ground
Passenger air bag (inflator) module circuit has been shorted to ground.
Passenger Air Bag Circuit Shorted to Power Supply
Passenger air bag (inflator) module circuit has been shorted to power supply.
Driver Seat Belt Pretensioner Circuit High Resistance
Driver seat belt pretensioner circuit resistance is more than specified range.
Driver Seat Belt Pretensioner Circuit Low Resistance
Driver seat belt pretensioner circuit resistance is less than specified range.
Driver Seat Belt Pretensioner Circuit Shorted to Ground
Driver seat belt pretensioner circuit has been shorted to ground.
Driver Seat Belt Pretensioner Circuit Shorted to Power Supply
Driver seat belt pretensioner circuit has been shorted to power supply.
Passenger Seat Belt Pretensioner Circuit High Resistance
Passenger seat belt pretensioner circuit resistance is more than specified range.
Passenger Seat Belt Pretensioner Circuit Low Resistance
Passenger seat belt pretensioner circuit resistance is less than specified range.
Passenger Seat Belt Pretensioner Circuit Shorted to Ground
Passenger seat belt pretensioner circuit has been shorted to ground.
Passenger Seat Belt Pretensioner Circuit Shorted to Power Supply
Passenger seat belt pretensioner circuit has been shorted to power supply.
Side Air Bag Circuit High Resistance (Driver Side)
Driver-side side-air bag (inflator) module circuit resistance is more than specified range.
Side Air Bag Circuit Low Resistance (Driver Side)
Driver-side side-air bag (inflator) module circuit resistance is less than specified range.
Side Air Bag Circuit Shorted to Ground (Driver Side)
Driver-side side-air bag (inflator) module circuit has been shorted to ground.
Side Air Bag Circuit Shorted to Power Supply (Driver Side)
Driver-side side-air bag (inflator) module circuit has been shorted to power supply.
Side Air Bag Circuit High Resistance (Passenger Side)
Passenger-side side-air bag (inflator) module circuit resistance is more than specified range.
Side Air Bag Circuit Low Resistance (Passenger Side)
Passenger-side side-air bag (inflator) module circuit resistance is less than specified range.
Side Air Bag Circuit Shorted to Ground (Passenger Side)
Passenger-side side-air bag (inflator) module circuit has been shorted to ground.
Side Air Bag Circuit Shorted to Power Supply (Passenger Side)
Passenger-side side-air bag (inflator) module circuit has been shorted to power supply.
Driver Forward Impact Sensor Communication Data Inconsistent
Driver-side forward impact sensor has communicated with no response or had inconsistent ID code.
Driver Forward Impact Sensor Communication Data Invalid
Driver-side forward impact sensor has communicated with invalid data.
Driver Forward Impact Sensor Circuit Shorted to Ground
Driver-side forward impact sensor circuit has been shorted to ground.
Driver Forward Impact Sensor Circuit Open
Driver-side forward impact sensor circuit has been shorted to power supply or opened.
Passenger Forward Impact Sensor Communication Data Inconsistent
Passenger-side forward impact sensor has communicated with no response or inconsistent ID code.
Passenger Forward Impact Sensor Communication Data Invalid
Passenger-side forward impact sensor has communicated with invalid data.
Passenger Forward Impact Sensor Circuit Shorted to Ground
Passenger-side forward impact sensor circuit has been shorted to ground.
Passenger Forward Impact Sensor Circuit Open
Passenger-side forward impact sensor circuit has been shorted to power supply or opened.
Side Impact Sensor No Response (Driver Side)
Driver-side front side-impact sensor has communicated with no response.
Side Impact Sensor Communication Data Invalid (Driver Side)
Driver-side front side-impact sensor has communicated with invalid data.
Side Impact Sensor Circuit Shorted to Ground (Driver Side)
Driver-side front side-impact sensor circuit has been shorted to ground.
Side Impact Sensor Circuit Open (Driver Side)
Driver-side front side-impact sensor circuit has been shorted to power supply or opened.
Side Impact Sensor Communication Data Inconsistent (Driver Side)
Driver-side front side-impact sensor has communicated with inconsistent ID code.
Side Impact Sensor No Response (Passenger Side)
Passenger-side front side-impact sensor has communicated with no response.
Side Impact Sensor Communication Data Invalid (Passenger Side)
Passenger-side front side-impact sensor has communicated with invalid data.
Side Impact Sensor Circuit Shorted to Ground (Passenger Side)
Passenger-side front side-impact sensor circuit has been shorted to ground.
Side Impact Sensor Circuit Open (Passenger Side)
Passenger-side front side-impact sensor circuit has been shorted to power supply or opened.
Side Impact Sensor Communication Data Inconsistent (Passenger Side)
Passenger-side front side-impact sensor has communicated with inconsistent ID code.
Knee Air bag Deployment Record (Driver Side)
Deployment of knee air bag (inflator) module has been recorded in SDM.
Knee Air bag Resistance too High (Driver Side)
Knee air bag (inflator) module circuit resistance is more than specified range.
Knee Air bag Resistance too Low (Driver Side)
Knee air bag (inflator) module circuit resistance is less than specified range.
Knee Air bag Short to GND (Driver Side)
Knee air bag (inflator) module circuit has been shorted to ground.
Knee Air bag Circuit Shorted to Power Supply (Driver Side)
Knee air bag (inflator) module circuit has been shorted to power supply.
Passenger Cut Off SW Detected
Wrong SDM (Without passenger air bag deactivation switch) is installed on vehicle (With passenger air bag deactivation switch).
Curtain Air Bag Circuit High Resistance (Driver Side)
Driver-side curtain air bag (inflator) module circuit resistance is more than specified range.
Curtain Air Bag Circuit Low Resistance (Driver Side)
Driver-side curtain air bag (inflator) module circuit resistance is less than specified range.
Curtain Air Bag Circuit Shorted to Ground (Driver Side)
Driver-side curtain air bag (inflator) module circuit has been shorted to ground.
Curtain Air Bag Circuit Shorted to Power Supply (Driver Side)
Driver-side curtain air bag (inflator) module circuit has been shorted to power supply.
Curtain Air Bag Circuit High Resistance (Passenger Side)
Passenger-side curtain air bag (inflator) module circuit resistance is more than specified range.
Curtain Air Bag Circuit Low Resistance (Passenger Side)
Passenger-side curtain air bag (inflator) module circuit resistance is less than specified range.
Curtain Air Bag Circuit Shorted to Ground (Passenger Side)
Passenger-side curtain air bag (inflator) module circuit has been shorted to ground.
Curtain Air Bag Circuit Shorted to Power Supply (Passenger Side)
Passenger-side curtain air bag (inflator) module circuit has been shorted to power supply.
Side Rear Impact Sensor No Response (Driver Side)
Driver-side rear side-impact sensor has communicated with no response.
Side Rear Impact Sensor Communication Data Invalid (Driver Side)
Driver-side rear side-impact sensor has communicated with invalid data.
Side Rear Impact Sensor Circuit Shorted to Ground (Driver Side)
Driver-side rear side-impact sensor circuit has been shorted to ground.
Side Rear Impact Sensor Circuit Open (Driver Side)
Driver-side rear side-impact sensor circuit has been shorted to power circuit or opened.
Side Rear Impact Sensor Communication Data Inconsistent (Driver Side)
Driver-side rear side-impact sensor has communicated with inconsistent ID code.
Side Rear Impact Sensor No Response (Passenger Side)
Passenger-side rear side-impact sensor has communicated with no response.
Side Rear Impact Sensor Communication Data Invalid (Passenger Side)
Passenger-side rear side-impact sensor has communicated with invalid data.
Side Rear Impact Sensor Circuit Shorted to Ground (Passenger Side)
Passenger-side rear side-impact sensor circuit has been shorted to ground.
Side Rear Impact Sensor Circuit Open (Passenger Side)
Passenger-side rear side-impact sensor circuit has been shorted to power supply or opened.
Side Rear Impact Sensor Communication Data Inconsistent (Passenger Side)
Passenger-side rear side-impact sensor has communicated with inconsistent ID code.
Control Module Communication Bus Off
Transmitting and receiving error of SDM for specified time continuously.
